name: ExtensionAdministrableProductDefinition_AdministrableDoseForm
title: R5: The dose form of the final product after necessary reconstitution or processing (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AdministrableProductDefinition.administrableDoseForm` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AdministrableProductDefinition.administrableDoseForm` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AdministrableProductDefinition.administrableDoseForm` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.administrableDoseForm` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `AdministrableProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.administrableDoseForm` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The dose form of the final product after necessary reconstitution or processing (new)
element.comment:
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.administrableDoseForm` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `AdministrableProductDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `AdministrableProductDefinition.administrableDoseForm` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: The dose form of the final product after necessary reconstitution or processing
element.definition: The dose form of the final product after necessary reconstitution or processing. Contrasts to the manufactured dose form (see ManufacturedItemDefinition). If the manufactured form was 'powder for solution for injection', the administrable dose form could be 'solution for injection' (once mixed with another item having manufactured form 'solvent for solution for injection').

binding.description: Dose form for a medication, in the form suitable for administering to the patient, after mixing, where necessary.
